  sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000:1F90 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 12345 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   1: 0100007F:0035 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000     0        0 23456 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   2: 050011AC:1F90 030011AC:CF5A 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 34567 1 0000000000000000 20 4 24 10 -1
